title: Requesting personal information :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Requesting personal information
Find out how to request to see the information we hold about you or someone else or make a change to the personal details on your application.
- Request or change your personal information Request to see or change the information we hold about you, or make a change to the personal details on your application.

## Request or change your personal information
Request to see or change the information we hold about you, or make a change to the personal details on your application.
- Request my information form Use this form to ask for information we have about you, like your immigration status and departure and arrival dates, and to order a letter confirming your immigration status.

## Request my information form
Use this form to ask for information we have about you, like your immigration status and departure and arrival dates, and to order a letter confirming your immigration status.
- Request personal information for someone else form If someone has given you permission to request their personal information from us, you can use this form to ask for that information. For example, their departure and arrival dates, and to order a letter confirming their immigration status.

## Request personal information for someone else form
If someone has given you permission to request their personal information from us, you can use this form to ask for that information. For example, their departure and arrival dates, and to order a letter confirming their immigration status.
- Visa status of children born in New Zealand The immigration status of a child born in New Zealand depends on their parents' status — they are not automatically a New Zealand citizen.

## Visa status of children born in New Zealand
The immigration status of a child born in New Zealand depends on their parents' status — they are not automatically a New Zealand citizen.
